title: centrolepis pulvinata
intro: Centrolepis pulvinata, also known as the New Zealand button grass or button grass, is a small, perennial plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Centrolepis pulvinata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, and is also sometimes used in modern herbal medicine due to its potential bioactive compounds.
